rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §253.091 governs which corporations are covered under its subchapter. The two provisions address unrelated subjects.
quote: This subchapter applies only to corporations that are organized under the Texas Business Corporation Act, the Texas For-Profit Corporation Law, the Texas Non-Profit Corporation Act, the Texas Nonprofit Corporation Law, federal law, or law of another state or nation.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no overlap in subject matter.
